concerns.analysis: The pipeline output explicitly omits a massive portion of the document. Pages 6 through 22 are entirely absent from the conversion result. This includes critical sections such as the North Central, South Central, and Western Region Reports, the PSAP Assessment Coordinator Report, the Word from Your RCs, the entire 'Nerd Herd' technical section (4 pages), the 'Education Station' training section (3 pages), Finance Team updates and reminders, and the first PSAP Highlight (Kevin Anderson).

concerns.description: Heading count mismatch between JSON and HTML
concerns.analysis: There is a significant mismatch between the heading count in the JSON (31) and the rendered HTML (42). This difference of 11 headings exceeds the 10% threshold and the 3-heading tolerance, indicating that the renderer either added or failed to deduplicate headings (likely treating section titles as additional headings).

concerns.analysis: There is a significant mismatch between the number of links identified in the JSON (3) and those in the rendered HTML (35). The source document only contains a handful of actionable links (one URL, several emails, and a phone number). The HTML count suggests heavy link injection, likely auto-linking images or common text strings not intended as links.
